Appearances:
Plaintiff All Hallows Preservation, L. P. is present. Represented by Brandon Cesar.
Attorney Jane Creason appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chad MacFarland is present.
Attorney Madeline Howard representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June -04-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
